description.en: UnionPay is a Chinese financial services company and global card network operated by China UnionPay, supporting UnionPay-branded card payments for online and in-person acceptance worldwide.

features.title: card network
features.description: UnionPay provides card network capabilities for merchants.

features.description: UnionPay supports online payment flows for ecommerce merchants.

features.title: in person payments
features.description: UnionPay supports in-person payment acceptance for merchant checkout flows.

features.title: Global card acceptance
features.description: Accept UnionPay cards for ecommerce and point-of-sale transactions where supported by your PSP/acquirer.

api_fields.value: CUP, China UnionPay, UnionPay Card, Ginren

tip: To reduce UnionPay declines, ensure you pass complete billing details and use 3DS where required by the issuer/region.

faq.question: What is UnionPay?
faq.answer: UnionPay is a global card network from China UnionPay. Merchants can accept UnionPay-branded cards through a compatible PSP/acquirer.

faq.question: Do I integrate directly with UnionPay to accept it?
faq.answer: Most merchants accept UnionPay through their payment service provider (PSP) and/or acquiring bank. Check whether your provider has UnionPay enabled for your region and channels.

faq.question: Can I accept UnionPay online and in-store?
faq.answer: Yes, UnionPay supports both ecommerce (card-not-present) and in-person payments, depending on your PSP/acquirer and terminal/payment gateway configuration.

faq.question: Why are my UnionPay transactions getting declined?
faq.answer: Common causes include missing/incorrect billing data, issuer authentication requirements (e.g., 3DS), unsupported merchant category/route, or issuer risk checks. Review decline codes with your PSP/acquirer and ensure complete payment data is sent.

faq.question: Does UnionPay support 3D Secure?
faq.answer: UnionPay can support 3D Secure via your PSP/acquirer. Enabling 3DS where applicable may help reduce fraud and improve issuer acceptance in some cases.

faq.question: How do refunds and chargebacks work for UnionPay?
faq.answer: Refunds are processed via your PSP/acquirer. Disputes are handled through the chargeback process managed by your acquirer, following network rules and timelines.

seo.seo_description: UnionPay is a global card network. Learn how to accept UnionPay cards online and in-store via your PSP or acquiring bank.
seo.keywords: UnionPay, China UnionPay, card network, accept UnionPay, 3D Secure, chargebacks, refunds, cross-border payments
